StructurePhase.Reference: Markiv V.Y., Belyavina N.N., Russ. Metall. (Engl. Transl.) p163 (1981)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: N3O5. LPF Collection Code: 528436. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Hf,Ga. Compound Preparation: arc-melted. ATMOSPHERE: argon. Sample annealed at 1023 K for 700 h in evacuated quartz tube, water-quenched. Article Title: ISOTHERMAL SECTIONS OF THE Hf-Sc-Ga AND Hf-Ti-Ga (750° C) PHASE DIAGRAMS. Wyckoff Sequence: g2 d. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Taylor A., Doyle N.J., J. Less-Common Met., v7 p37 (1964)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: N. LPF Collection Code: 250232. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Hf,Nb. Compound Preparation: arc-melted. CRUCIBLE: copper hearth. ATMOSPHERE: purified argon. Sample annealed at 2273 K for 86.4-324 ks, furnace-cooled. Article Title: THE CONSTITUTION DIAGRAM OF THE NIOBIUM-HAFNIUM SYSTEM. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factor reported/abstracted. Wyckoff Sequence: a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
